title: Automate SAP order-to-cash with multi-agent AI & Google Agent Development Kit (ADK)
summary: Google Cloud demonstrates using the Agent Development Kit and Model Context Protocol to automate SAP order-to-cash workflows via multi-agent AI. The approach replaces brittle RPA scripts with resilient agents that reason, verify inventory, and execute transactions through secure APIs using Gemini's large context window and parallel tool execution.
